summary: Tested Finish Session flow end-to-end. All 5 tests passed. Backend POST /api/session/finish works correctly (4/4 pytest tests passed). UI: Celebration modal appears with correct stats, schedule shows TODAY·DONE, fresh session loads on next visit.
seed_data_creation: Logged Speed Deadlift sets (4 entries) for user_001 to reach 56% completion threshold for FINISH SESSION button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finish Session flow fully verified. Speed Lower session was completed, next session (Speed Upper) loads fresh. Schedule shows TODAY·DONE for completed session.

test_results.TEST1_celebration_modal: PASS - Modal appeared with 14 SETS, 12.8k VOLUME, Speed Lower session type. Console shows '[Today] Finish: notified backend' and '[Today] Finish: AsyncStorage cleared'
test_results.TEST2_button_disabled: PASS - After DONE dismissed modal, page advanced to next session (Speed Upper) with fresh 0/20 state. Previous session's FINISH SESSION button not accessible confirming session state cleared
test_results.TEST3_no_ghost_sets: PASS - After finish, navigated back to Today showing Speed Upper (new session) with 0/20 sets. No ghost sets from Speed Lower visible
test_results.TEST4_schedule_shows_done: PASS - Schedule tab shows Speed Lower as 'TODAY · DONE' with green checkmark, 16 sets, 13.1k lb volume
test_results.TEST5_backend_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/session/finish returns 200 with correct structure. Backend logs '[Today] Finish: notified backend, sessionId: daa56c9d-11a'. No 'Block object has no attribute sessions' error
